release_notes:
Alpha 5.0.80 - 2026-05-15 - TWO criticals.

(1) CN8 Updater "no matching CN8 rows found"
============================================

Pablo: "the CN8 updater does not work... i press on apply all
suggestions and i get this dumb error ... how hell no matching
CN8 was found when there are literally on top of the
screenshot the proposed new CN8 to update the file?!"

Root cause: ``apply_replacements`` in
``src.qt_app.commodity_codes_engine`` hardcoded
``for sheet_name in ("Arrivals", "Dispatches")``. The Intrastat
parser identifies data sheets by POSITION precisely so that
localised workbooks work without translation tables -- BE files
have "Aankomst" / "Verzending", DE files "Eingang" / "Versand",
etc. The scan path correctly found 3 outdated codes; the apply
path silently skipped every sheet because none matched the
hardcoded English names.

Fix: walk the same sheets the scan walks. The new logic:
1. Build a candidate list of every sheet that ISN'T in
SKIP_SHEET_NAMES (audit, SAP Report, PIVOT, Summary,
Comments, Audit Checklist, Country Information, VAT
Return, ESPL, Aged invoices, Anomalies, Excluded,
Issued, Received).
2. If the file has "Arrivals" AND "Dispatches" by name,
prefer those (legacy parity).
3. Otherwise fall back to the first 2 non-metadata sheets
(matches the parser's by-position convention).

Also: the "No matching" error now lists which sheets were
walked + the column + the searched codes, so the user can tell
wrong-sheets from wrong-column from wrong-codes.

(2) Reviewer file-comparison lost its 4.x format
================================================

Pablo: "The review module lost la funcionalidad de comparar
los ficheros que ANTES tenía el formato anterior de
aplicación. TEENEMOS QUE RECUPERARLO YA."

Root cause: the 5.0.15 Qt port replaced the 4.x rich 3-layer
comparison (verdict + per-sheet cell-diff + invoice-key diff
+ Excel report) with a thin row-delta path that only walked
Issued / Received / Excluded and reported "A: N rows / B: M
rows / first 5 new/removed". The pure-data engine
``src.reviewer.file_comparison.compare_files`` was still on
disk, just unused.

Fix: rewrite ``QFileComparisonDialog`` to:
- Call ``compare_files(left, right)`` for the full result.
- Render the verdict as a coloured chip with the headline.
- Render the per-sheet breakdown (rows A / rows B / cell
diffs / invoice-key diffs) in the report textarea.
- Light up a NEW "💾 Save Excel report…" button that calls
``write_comparison_report`` to produce the styled
multi-sheet .xlsx the 4.x version did. Ideal for attaching
to a review e-mail.

Tests
=====

tests/test_1011_qt_580_cn8_apply_and_compare.py (NEW, 9):
CN8:
- apply succeeds on a BE workbook with localised sheet
names (Aankomst / Verzending).
- When both layouts are present, canonical names win.
- "No match" error now explains what was walked.
- Metadata sheets (SAP Report / PIVOT / Summary / Comments)
are skipped.
Reviewer comparison:
- Dialog source uses ``compare_files`` (not the old delta
path) + has a Save Excel report button.
- Smoke construction.
- End-to-end identical content -> IDENTICAL / IDENTICAL_CONTENT.
- End-to-end different content -> DIFFERENT_CONTENT.

9/9 green.

===============================================================
